Footer.tagline: Leading logistics and transport operator in the region, connecting people with comfort and precision since 2012.

Home.heroTitle: Order a ticket and we will arrive with comfort
Home.heroSubtitle: We will help you realize the trip of dreams with our modern fleet and professional logistics team.
Home.feature1Text: Modern buses with air conditioning and reclining seats.
Home.feature2Text: See the price of every seat before you book — no hidden fees.
Home.feature3Text: Qualified staff with extensive experience on international routes.

About.missionP1: We are a company specialized in the transport of persons, parcels and cars, the starting point or the arrival point being Moldova.
About.missionP2: We also operate with US parcels. Last generation coaches, qualified staff with extensive experience in the field, comfort and safety — all of which we offer you at the lowest prices.
